details: The agent navigated to the correct pages but misinterpreted the content. The agent found the first entry in the alphabetical 'Maintainers List' section (3C59X NETWORK DRIVER / Steffen Klassert) rather than the first maintainer listed at the top of the file. According to the known facts, Linus Torvalds is listed as the overall maintainer at the top of the MAINTAINERS file, before the alphabetical list begins. The agent failed to look above line 375 where Linus Torvalds would appear.
